name: Discord Admin
description: Full Discord server administration suite: roles, moderation, channels, invites, webhooks, audit log

discordToken.label: Discord Bot Token
discordToken.description: Bot token with privileged intents (Guild Members, Guild Moderation). Sourced from channels.discord.token in OpenClaw config.

credentials.label: Discord Bot Token
credentials.description: Discord bot token with Guilds, GuildMembers (privileged), GuildModeration, GuildMessages, GuildInvites, and GuildWebhooks intents enabled.
